name: braillify
description: Braillify is a library for converting text to braille.
author: devfive

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir ./pkg --out-name index --release && bun run optimize
scripts.optimize: wasm-opt -Oz --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext -o pkg/index_bg_opt.wasm pkg/index_bg.wasm && mv pkg/index_bg_opt.wasm pkg/index_bg.wasm
